programme.title: The Year Dolly Parton Was My Mom
programme.desc: Elizabeth is an average 11-year-old until she finds out her entire life is a lie. Starring Gil Bellows, Macha Grenon, Trevor Hayes.

programme.title: The Other Half
programme.desc: A woman with bipolar disorder and a grief-stricken man struggle to forge a simpler life. Starring Tom Cullen, Tatiana Maslany, Suzanne Clement.

programme.title: Giant Little Ones
programme.desc: Franky and Ballas are athletic, popular and living the perfect high school life until the night of Frankys 17th birthday party when an incident changes their lives forever. Starring Josh Wiggins, Darren Mann, Taylor Hickson.

programme.title: How She Move
programme.desc: Forced to return to public school after her sisters death, a young dancer (Rutina Wesley) has a rivalry with a classmate (Tre Armstrong) and joins an all-male dance troupe. Starring Rutina Wesley, Tre Armstrong, Dwain Murphy.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.sub-title: The Best Youll Feel All Day
programme.desc: Jackie goes on a bender and puts Krista in danger; Junior seeks to prove himself; Ray and Renee go on a date.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: Jackie and Junior have trouble coping in the wake of a traumatic event; Rays investigation gains momentum; Ray is there for Renee when she needs him.

programme.title: The Imaginarium of Dr Parnassus
programme.desc: After a carnival troupe saves his life, a man (Heath Ledger) agrees to help its immortal leader (Christopher Plummer) collect five souls and win a bet with the devil. Starring Heath Ledger, Christopher Plummer, Verne Troyer.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: As Hollow Earth Abnormals continue to arrive at the surface in droves, Will, Henry, Kate and Bigfoot scramble to prevent war with the Lotus Security Forces; they worry about the whereabouts and safety of Magnus who was last seen heading to Praxis.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: With a government inspector threatening to cut off the Sanctuarys funding, Magnus and Will must explain a failed mission.

programme.title: Cairo Time
programme.desc: During a vacation in Egypt, an unexpected love affair arises between a magazine editor (Patricia Clarkson) and her husbands former colleague (Alexander Siddig). Starring Patricia Clarkson, Alexander Siddig, Elena Anaya.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit and his three sisters enjoy spending their days in Mr. McGregors vegetable garden. A battle of wills soon breaks out as McGregor hatches scheme after scheme to get rid of Peter -- a rabbit who proves to be a worthy and wily opponent. Starring James Corden, Fayssal Bazzi, Domhnall Gleeson.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit 2: The Runaway
programme.desc: Venturing out of the garden, Peter finds himself in a world where his mischief is appreciated. However, when his makeshift family risks everything to come looking for him, Peter must figure out what kind of bunny he wants to be. Starring James Corden, Rose Byrne, Domhnall Gleeson.

programme.title: Cooking With Stella
programme.desc: A woman cooks for clients and tries to keep her thefts of food and money from being discovered. Starring Don McKellar, Seema Biswas, Lisa Ray.

programme.title: Dr. Strangelove Or: How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love the Bomb
programme.desc: President Muffley and his advisers man the Pentagon war room, as planes with bombs head toward Moscow. Starring Peter Sellers, George C. Scott, Keenan Wynn.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: American boy Dre Parkers fighting skills are no match for Cheng, the school bully. He finds a friend in Mr. Han, a maintenance man who is also a martial-arts master. Mr. Han teaches Dre kung fu in the hope that Dre will be able to face down Cheng. Starring Jaden Smith, Jackie Chan, Taraji P. Henson.

In 1946, Branch Rickey (Harrison Ford), general manager of the Brooklyn Dodgers, signs Jackie Robinson (Chadwick Boseman) to the team in defiance of major league baseballs notorious color barrier. Starring Chadwick Boseman, Harrison Ford, Nicole Beharie.

programme.title: Empire of Dirt
programme.desc: Lena flees to her rural hometown after her 13-year-old daughters overdose attracts the attention of child services. She reunites with her estranged mother and is forced to face a past she has tried to ignore. Starring Cara Gee, Shay Eyre, Jennifer Podemski.

programme.title: Breakfast With Scot
programme.desc: Gay partners (Tom Cavanagh, Ben Shenkman) become the temporary guardians of a flamboyant orphan (Noah Bernett). Starring Tom Cavanagh, Ben Shenkman, Noah Bernett.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.sub-title: Everybodys Got a Cousin in Miami
programme.desc: When Jackie realizes Junior is involved with Sherry Hunters murder, she enlists Ray and the entire CCINU to help find him; Renee questions her budding relationship with Ray.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: Jackie and Ray try to return to business as usual after a depressing failure, only to learn the case might not be closed.

programme.title: Starbuck
programme.desc: More than 140 people sue a fertility clinic to reveal the name of the sperm donor (Patrick Huard) whose frequent contributions resulted in 533 offspring. Starring Patrick Huard, Julie Le Breton, Antoine Bertrand.

programme.title: I Am Bruce Lee
programme.desc: The amazing story of one of the greatest icons ever to enter the public consciousness, the first film to truly tell Bruce Lees story in his own words and actions. Starring Kobe Bryant, Gina Carano, Reginald Hudlin.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus flies to Africa to meet Sanctuarys secret financial advisor but ends up in a deadly hostage situation.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The team tracks an ?bnormal fugitive and discovers that Tesla is the head of a secret research lab for a Homeland Security agency that conducts tests on Abnormals.

programme.title: New York Minute
programme.desc: An uptight teenager (Ashley Olsen) and her laid-back twin (Mary-Kate Olsen) spend a wild day on the streets of Manhattan. Starring Ashley Olsen, Mary-Kate Olsen, Eugene Levy.

programme.title: Richie Rich
programme.desc: The boy zillionaire (Macaulay Culkin) saves his parents and Rich Industries from a scheming executive (John Larroquette). Starring Macaulay Culkin, John Larroquette, Edward Herrmann.

programme.title: Curious George
programme.desc: The Man in the Yellow Hat is on hand to help an inquisitive monkey out of trouble on a series of misadventures. Starring Will Ferrell, Drew Barrymore, David Cross.

programme.title: Shooting Stars
programme.desc: The inspiring origin story of how LeBron James and his childhood friends became the No. 1 high school team in the country, launching James career. Starring Wood Harris, Mookie Cook, Caleb McLaughlin.

programme.title: Meditation Park
programme.desc: A dutiful wife and mother re-examines her veneration of her husband after she finds another womans underwear in his laundry. Starring Sandra Oh, Liane Balaban, Tzi Ma.

programme.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
programme.desc: Family tensions arise after a woman (Nia Vardalos) falls in love with a man (John Corbett) who is not Greek. Starring Nia Vardalos, John Corbett, Michael Constantine.

programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: A Beverly Hills teen (Alicia Silverstone) plays matchmaker for teachers, transforms a bad dresser (Brittany Murphy) and examines her own existence. Starring Alicia Silverstone, Stacey Dash, Brittany Murphy.

programme.title: The Vow
programme.desc: After his newlywed wife awakes from a coma, a man works to restore her lost memory and rebuild their marriage. Starring Rachel McAdams, Channing Tatum, Sam Neill.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: At the request of the Grants, Ellen undergoes a test to prove her worthiness to marry into the clan.

programme.title: Under the Skin
programme.desc: Disguising herself as a human female, an extraterrestrial (Scarlett Johansson) drives around Scotland and tries to lure unsuspecting men into her van. Starring Scarlett Johansson, Jeremy McWilliams, Lynsey Taylor Mackay.

programme.title: Brooklyn
programme.desc: An Irish immigrant (Saoirse Ronan) in the 1950s New York falls for a tough Italian plumber (Emory Cohen), but faces temptation from another man (Domhnall Gleeson) when she returns to her homeland for a visit. Starring Saoirse Ronan, Domhnall Gleeson, Emory Cohen.

programme.title: Trainwreck
programme.desc: A promiscuous magazine writer considers monogamy for the first time when she starts to fall in love with the charming sports doctor shes profiling. Starring Amy Schumer, Bill Hader, Brie Larson.

programme.title: Matthias and Maxime
programme.desc: Two young mens lifelong friendship is tested when they act in a movie whose script calls for them to kiss each other. Starring Gabriel DAlmeida Freitas, Xavier Dolan, Harris Dickinson.

programme.title: Goose!
programme.desc: A boy (Max Morrow) conspires to save a talking gander from a man (Chevy Chase) who plans to cook the bird in an upcoming culinary contest. Starring Chevy Chase, Kari Matchett, Max Morrow.

programme.title: Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: An eager beagle joins undercover canines on a mission to foil a feline plot to make all people allergic to dogs. Starring Jeff Goldblum, Elizabeth Perkins, Miriam Margolyes.

programme.title: Cats and Dogs 2: The Revenge of Kitty Galore
programme.desc: Felines and canines form an unprecedented alliance to protect themselves and their humans from a rogue cat who wants to turn the world into her personal scratching post. Starring James Marsden, Nick Nolte, Christina Applegate.

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: A poor boy (Freddie Highmore) and four spoiled children win a tour through the incredible factory of an odd confectioner (Johnny Depp). Starring Johnny Depp, Freddie Highmore, David Kelly.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: The Caped Crusader (Michael Keaton) saves dismal Gotham City and gorgeous Vicki Vale (Kim Basinger) from the freaky Joker (Jack Nicholson). Starring Jack Nicholson, Michael Keaton, Kim Basinger.

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: The Caped Crusader (Michael Keaton) clashes with Catwoman (Michelle Pfeiffer) and saves gloomy Gotham City from the foul Penguins (Danny DeVito) plot. Starring Michael Keaton, Danny DeVito, Michelle Pfeiffer.

programme.title: Batman Forever
programme.desc: The Caped Crusader (Val Kilmer) woos a criminal psychologist, takes on a sidekick and battles Two-Face (Tommy Lee Jones) and the Riddler (Jim Carrey). Starring Val Kilmer, Tommy Lee Jones, Jim Carrey.

programme.title: Batman and Robin
programme.desc: Batgirl joins the caped crusaders (George Clooney, Chris ODonnell) to stop Mr. Freeze (Arnold Schwarzenegger) and Poison Ivy from wreaking revenge upon the world. Starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, George Clooney, Chris ODonnell.

programme.title: Anniversary
programme.desc: Tensions rise and loyalties are tested when a couple meet their sons new girlfriend, a radical young woman whos part of a controversial movement known as the Change. Starring Diane Lane, Kyle Chandler, Madeline Brewer.

programme.title: The Rental
programme.desc: Two couples on an oceanside getaway grow suspicious that the host of their seemingly perfect rental house may be spying on them. Before long, what should have been a celebratory weekend trip turns into something far more sinister. Starring Dan Stevens, Alison Brie, Sheila Vand.

programme.title: Fubar 2
programme.desc: Head bangers Terry (David Lawrence) and Dean (Paul J. Spence) are tired of barely scraping by and jump on an opportunity to go north and work on the pipelines during the holidays. Starring Dave Lawrence, Paul Spence, Gordon Skilling.

programme.title: Champions
programme.desc: A former minor-league basketball coach receives a court order to manage a team of players with intellectual disabilities. Despite his doubts, he soon realizes that together they can go further than they ever imagined. Starring Woody Harrelson, Kaitlin Olson, Matt Cook.

programme.title: Gildersleeve on Broadway
programme.desc: Throckmorton P. Gildersleeve (Harold Peary) meets a rich widow (Billie Burke) and a gold digger (Claire Carleton) in New York. Starring Harold Peary, Billie Burke, Claire Carleton.

programme.title: The 7th Voyage of Sinbad
programme.desc: Sinbad the sailor (Kerwin Mathews) needs the egg of a giant two-headed bird of prey to restore a shrunken princess (Kathryn Grant). Starring Kerwin Mathews, Kathryn Grant, Richard Eyer.

programme.title: The Golden Voyage of Sinbad
programme.desc: Sailor Sinbad (John Phillip Law) fights a one-eyed centaur, a ships figurehead and other creatures sent by an evil prince (Tom Baker). Starring John Phillip Law, Caroline Munro, Tom Baker.

programme.title: Sinbad and the Eye of the Tiger
programme.desc: Sinbad (Patrick Wayne) and a princess (Jane Seymour) try to save her brother, turned into a baboon by a wicked sorceress. Starring Patrick Wayne, Jane Seymour, Taryn Power.

programme.title: The Valley of Gwangi
programme.desc: A Wild West showman (James Franciscus) and his cowboys find dinosaurs near a Mexican town and put one on display. Starring James Franciscus, Gila Golan, Richard Carlson.

programme.title: Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: Perseus (Harry Hamlin), the half-mortal son of Zeus (Laurence Olivier), fights meddling gods and mythical monsters for beautiful Andromeda (Judi Bowker). Starring Harry Hamlin, Laurence Olivier, Judi Bowker.

programme.title: Penrods Double Trouble
programme.desc: When a young boy disappears, a man desperate for the offered reward money turns up with an identical child. Starring Billy Mauch, Dick Purcell, Gene Lockhart.

programme.title: Twice Blessed
programme.desc: Identical twins (Lee Wilde) with different IQs trade places to reunite their parents (Preston Foster, Gail Patrick). Starring Preston Foster, Gail Patrick, Lee Wilde.

programme.title: Another Face
programme.desc: A movie star abandons her press agent when he appears to be more interested in publicity than in her well-being. Starring Wallace Ford, Brian Donlevy, Phyllis Brooks.

programme.title: Road to Paradise
programme.desc: A young woman (Loretta Young) falls in with a gang of criminals, and when they rob a wealthy socialites house, she finds her long-lost twin sister. Starring Loretta Young, Jack Mulhall, Raymond Hatton.

programme.title: Droopys Double Trouble
programme.desc: Spike the bulldog tries to take advantage of Droopys kindness by moving into the house he is looking after, unaware that Droopys identical twin brother is also guarding the home. Starring Bill Thompson, Daws Butler.

programme.title: The Double Man
programme.desc: A CIA agent (Yul Brynner) is lured to the Alps and replaced in Washington by a look-alike Soviet spy. Starring Yul Brynner, Britt Ekland, Clive Revill.

programme.title: Dead Ringer
programme.desc: Edith (Bette Davis) kills Margaret, her twin, and takes her identity, fooling Ediths boyfriend (Karl Malden) but not Margarets lover. Starring Bette Davis, Karl Malden, Peter Lawford.

programme.title: The Scapegoat
programme.desc: An Englishman (Alec Guinness) doubles for a decadent French count who has an Italian mistress (Nicole Maurey) and a mother (Bette Davis) on morphine. Starring Alec Guinness, Bette Davis, Nicole Maurey.

programme.title: The Legend of Lylah Clare
programme.desc: A filmmaker manipulates a starlet into the image of his late wife, a celebrated actress who met a tragic death. Starring Kim Novak, Peter Finch, Ernest Borgnine.

programme.title: Hud
programme.desc: A housekeeper (Patricia Neal) sees a Texas cattle rancher (Melvyn Douglas) clash with his son (Paul Newman), a selfish, womanizing louse. Starring Paul Newman, Melvyn Douglas, Patricia Neal.

programme.title: Raggedy Man
programme.desc: A divorcee (Sissy Spacek) with two sons has an affair with a young sailor (Eric Roberts) passing through her Texas town in 1944. Starring Sissy Spacek, Eric Roberts, Sam Shepard.

programme.title: Slacker
programme.desc: Filmmaker Richard Linklater uses a string of mostly amateur actors to show varieties of a type: the new bohemian. Starring Rudy Basquez, Jean Caffeine, Jan Hockey.

programme.title: Paris, Texas
programme.desc: A lost man (Harry Dean Stanton) surfaces, reunites with his brother (Dean Stockwell) and son, and finds his wife (Nastassja Kinski) working in a peep show. Starring Harry Dean Stanton, Nastassja Kinski, Dean Stockwell.

programme.title: The Southerner
programme.desc: Poor white tenant farmers (Zachary Scott, Betty Field, Beulah Bondi) battle fierce odds to make a living on a Texas plot. Starring Zachary Scott, Betty Field, Beulah Bondi.

programme.title: Lust for Life
programme.desc: Tormented Dutch painter Vincent van Gogh (Kirk Douglas) meets French painter Paul Gauguin (Anthony Quinn). Starring Kirk Douglas, Anthony Quinn, Everett Sloane.

programme.title: Tea and Sympathy
programme.desc: Marked as a sissy, a preppie (John Kerr) turns to his housemasters (Leif Erickson) understanding wife (Deborah Kerr). Starring Deborah Kerr, John Kerr, Leif Erickson.

programme.title: Home From the Hill
programme.desc: The son of a Texas millionaire (Robert Mitchum) rivals his illegitimate brother (George Peppard) for a woman. Starring Robert Mitchum, Eleanor Parker, George Peppard.

programme.title: The Four Horsemen of the Apocalypse
programme.desc: An Argentine playboy (Glenn Ford) loves the wife (Ingrid Thulin) of a French partisan and joins the underground against the Nazis. Starring Glenn Ford, Ingrid Thulin, Charles Boyer.

programme.title: Two Weeks in Another Town
programme.desc: An actor (Kirk Douglas) and a director (Edward G. Robinson), both washed-up in Hollywood, try to make a comeback in Rome. Starring Kirk Douglas, Edward G. Robinson, Cyd Charisse.

programme.title: The Courtship of Eddies Father
programme.desc: A young boy uses a peculiar and humorous standard to determine the perfect wife for his widowed father. Starring Glenn Ford, Shirley Jones, Ron Howard.

programme.title: Targets
programme.desc: A horror-film stars (Boris Karloff) retirement coincides with a young mans (Tim OKelly) shooting spree. Starring Boris Karloff, Tim OKelly, Nancy Hsueh.

programme.title: Piranha
programme.desc: Two people (Bradford Dillman, Heather Menzies) unwittingly free a mad military scientists (Kevin McCarthy) mutant fish near a summer camp and resort lake. Starring Bradford Dillman, Heather Menzies-Urich, Kevin McCarthy.

programme.title: Queen of Blood
programme.desc: Astronauts (John Saxon, Basil Rathbone, Judi Meredith) go to Mars and return with a green vampire woman. Starring John Saxon, Basil Rathbone, Judi Meredith.

programme.title: Dementia 13
programme.desc: Ax murders follow a heart attack at an Irish castle full of mourners (William Campbell, Luana Anders, Bart Patton). Starring William Campbell, Luana Anders, Bart Patton.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A French lieutenant (Jack Nicholson) follows a ghostly beauty (Sandra Knight) to a barons (Boris Karloff) Baltic coast castle. Starring Boris Karloff, Jack Nicholson, Sandra Knight.

programme.title: Dean Martin: King of Cool

programme.desc: A doctor calls on Tarzan to topple the native witch doctor whose black-magic remedies are killing patients. Starring Gordon Scott, Eve Brent, Rickie Sorensen.

programme.desc: A South American love story with Portuguese songs.

programme.title: Ziegfeld Girl
programme.desc: An elevator operator (Lana Turner), a vaudevillian (Judy Garland) and a violinists wife cope with sudden fame as chorus girls. Starring James Stewart, Judy Garland, Lana Turner.

programme.desc: A married British woman (Celia Johnson) and a doctor (Trevor Howard) meet first at a train station, then fall in love but decide to part. Starring Celia Johnson, Trevor Howard, Stanley Holloway.

programme.title: Levels
programme.desc: In the future, a man watches in horror as his girlfriend gets murdered, and the killer seemingly disappears into midair. programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Dancing Fools
programme.desc: Regina and Cedric (Wendy Raquel Robinson, Cedric The Entertainer) battle Lovita and Steve (Terri J. Vaughn, Steve Harvey) in a dance competition; Romeo (Merlin Santana) tries to get good grades.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Breakfast With Tiffany
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) is recruited to help raise the spirits of Reginas (Wendy Raquel Robinson) newly separated friend Tiffany (guest star Jackie Mari Roberts).

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Papas Got a Brand New Bag
programme.desc: An insurance policy makes Steve (Steve Harvey) suspicious of his fathers (guest star Richard Gant) new young fiancee (guest star Jaqueline Fleming).

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Just My Imagination
programme.desc: Steve and Romeo fight for the same womans attention; Cedric and Lovita question their compatibility.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Fumes of Detente
programme.desc: Wanda invites Tasha, Vanessas best friend from Chicago, to stay with them; Bernie is worried he will have another difficult teen in his house.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - You Dont Know Squad
programme.desc: Vanessa tries to increase her chances of being accepted into a college by joining the drill team, which pleases Bernie until he sees one of the squads provocative routines.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - You Got Served
programme.desc: Bernie is sued for being a negligent parent after a birthday bash for Bryana results in broken bones.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - I Dont Wanna Be a Playa No More
programme.desc: When Jordan develops a crush on a girl at school, Bernie takes it upon himself to teach Jordan how to be a player and get the girl.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Fading Youth
programme.desc: Exploring how regardless of the situation, the events of ones youth are defining.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Okan
programme.desc: Chef Bernard Bennett brings the African diaspora to fine dining with West African and Caribbean-inspired dishes, such as djon djon noodles and pork belly griot; Okan honors a legacy that Savannah knows, one of resilience, rhythm and reinvention.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Klom Klom
programme.desc: In a quiet corner of Savannah, Klom Klom Thai has become a magnet for locals and celebrities alike; chef Ann Healy and PJ introduce rare Northern Thai dishes like duck Chiang Mai khao soy and boat noodles that arent easy to find.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Narobias Grits And Gravy
programme.desc: Step into Narobias, and youre stepping into a family reunion; chef Renee Reid and daughter Sieda serve up classics like liver and onions and shrimp and grits drenched in their signature gravy; its more than breakfast, its history on a plate.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Lilis Restaurant
programme.desc: Chef Mir Ali brings his global upbringing to the table at Lilis, named after his daughter; this Savannah gem fuses Southern comfort with South Asian and French influences, crafting dishes like curry crab cakes and tandoori-spiced lamb.

programme.title: Back to the Goode Life
programme.desc: A successful New York banker goes from being boss to being broke after she is wrongfully accused of unethical banking practices.

programme.title: The Dempsey Sisters
programme.desc: Three siblings (Cymphonique Miller, Denyce Lawton, Teairra Mari) return to their musical roots, agreeing to let their brother manage their family band.

programme.title: Family Time - Merry Kwanzaa
programme.desc: When Lisas attempts to spread the holiday cheer fall short, Tony steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Family Time - Sick Of This
programme.desc: The Stallworths realize they are each a lot to handle when feeling under the weather.

programme.title: Family Time - Rich Donnie
programme.desc: Lisa helps Ebony with the SATs while Tony deals with Donnies inheritance.

programme.title: Family Time - Social Media Dad
programme.desc: Tony uses social media to shame the kids while Lisa finds herself in a sister tug-of-war.

programme.title: Family Time - Reunited And It Feels So Good
programme.desc: Lisa sets Cheryl up at Tony and Lisas high school reunion while Donnie crashes the party.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Easy Rider
programme.desc: A motorcycle accident changes Bernies perspective about protecting the kids; Jordan is caught trying to sell Bernies girlie magazines to other boys at school.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Whos That Lady?
programme.desc: Dr. Phil McGraw counsels Bernie on how to deal with Wanda, who feels left out after Bernie and the guys draft a woman (MoNique) into their group.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Mac-Inations
programme.desc: Neighbor Carl Reiner (guest starring as himself) plays the ultimate practical joke on Bernie. Ashton Kutcher guest stars as himself.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - That Old Mac Magic
programme.desc: American Idol judges Paula Abdul and Randy Jackson critique Bernies commercial.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Talk
programme.desc: Bernie stops by the Playboy Mansion to get advice from Hugh Hefner on how to talk to Jordan about sex.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Boomerang
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) becomes a fool for love when he falls for Reginas (Wendy Raquel Robinson) friend (guest star Roxanne Beckford). With William Lee Scott.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - All About Steve
programme.desc: A power-hungry Steve fills in for Regina as acting principal for a few days; Cedric and Lovita disagree about their wedding day.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Going, Going, Gone
programme.desc: Steve participates in a bachelor auction where a beautiful young bidder turns out to be a front for an older woman.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Y2K
programme.desc: After Steves extravagant plans fall apart, he rings in the new millennium with Regina, Cedric and Lovita.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Claires New Boyfriend
programme.desc: Rebellious Claire rejects the boyfriend her father likes and takes up with one he views with disfavor.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Crouching Mother, Hidden Father
programme.desc: Janets overzealous direction of the school play is cause for concern for Kadys kindergarten teacher.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Maid to Order
programme.desc: Hiring a maid (Esther Scott) leads to even more work for Steve, Cedric and Regina (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer, Wendy Raquel Robinson).

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Ice Station Piggy
programme.desc: A snowstorm causes Steve and Reginas relationship to heat up; Lovitas cousin is attracted to Cedric.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - White Men Can Funk
programme.desc: A replacement singer (guest star Adrian Zmed) shocks Steves (Steve Harvey) band, the Hi-Tops, with his talented vocals.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Ring Around the Piggy
programme.desc: Steve fears he will lose Regina forever when he is invited to Warringtons house for an announcement.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Fighting Kyles
programme.desc: Michael and Jay give their bickering kids a taste of their own medicine, making them scared theyre on the brink of breaking up.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Sister Story
programme.desc: Michaels sister (Vivica A. Fox) visits and sparks a rivalry with Jay.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Big Picture
programme.desc: Jordans prank anonymous phone calls have surprising consequences.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Music Mac
programme.desc: When Vanessa surprises everyone with her musical talent, Isaac Hayes offers Bernie advice on how to nurture it.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Walk Like a Man
programme.desc: Bernie sees children walking to school on their own and decides it is time for Jordan to do the same, despite Wandas objections.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Father Knows Best
programme.desc: When a man arrives from Chicago claiming to be Bryanas father, Bernie is cautiously supportive.

programme.title: The Yards (2000)
programme.desc: A friends lure of easy money draws an ex-con into the corrupt world of his uncles subway-train business.

programme.title: Mob Town (2019)
programme.desc: The FBI and a local cop track various members of organized crime families as they gather for a huge meeting in upstate New York in 1957.

programme.title: No Code of Conduct (1998)
programme.desc: Two policemen (Mark Dacascos, Charlie Sheen) learn that city leaders and law enforcement support heroin trafficking across the Mexican border.

programme.title: Asking for It (2022)
programme.desc: A victim of sexual assault joins an all-female gang that targets violent frat boys and a corrupt police force of human traffickers.

programme.title: Frank Millers Sin City (2005)
programme.desc: Lawmen, prostitutes (Devon Aoki, Alexis Bledel), a hulking thug and other sordid characters run amok in a crime-ridden metropolis.

programme.title: 68 Kill (2017)
programme.desc: A hardworking mans inability to say no to a beautiful women gets him in trouble when he agrees to steal $68,000.

programme.title: The Spy Who Sexed Me (2017)
programme.desc: A beautiful woman finds passion and intrigue.

programme.title: The Yards (2000)
programme.desc: A friends lure of easy money draws an ex-con into the corrupt world of his uncles subway-train business.

programme.title: Changeland (2019)
programme.desc: A man meets up with his best friend in Thailand while going through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Major League (1989)
programme.desc: Lackluster baseball players (Tom Berenger, Charlie Sheen, Corbin Bernsen) hear their Cleveland teams new owner is counting on them to lose.

programme.title: Paycheck (2003)
programme.desc: After learning that his memory has been erased, a technical wizard (Ben Affleck) goes on the run to piece together clues from his past.

programme.title: Crisis (2021)
programme.desc: A drug trafficker organizes a smuggling operation while a recovering addict seeks the truth behind her sons disappearance.

programme.title: The Core (2003)
programme.desc: In order to save mankind, scientists and astronauts must set off a nuclear device at the center of the Earth.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day (1991)
programme.desc: Two cyborgs from the future battle over the life of a teen (Edward Furlong) who will someday lead humanity against the machines.

programme.title: Vicious (2025)
programme.desc: A strange ritual soon unravels into a waking nightmare when a woman receives a mysterious box that comes with instructions to place three things inside: something you need, something you hate, and something you love.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: The Marked Ones (2014)
programme.desc: Family and friends try to save a Hispanic teen who appears to be possessed by malevolent supernatural forces.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: The Ghost Dimension (2015)
programme.desc: An old and mysterious camcorder leads to the discovery of a supernatural terror in a familys new home.

programme.title: Rush (2013)
programme.desc: Charismatic Englishman James Hunt (Chris Hemsworth) and Austrian perfectionist Niki Lauda (Daniel Bruhl) burn up the 1970s Formula 1 racing scene and share an intense rivalry on the track.

programme.title: Shaft (2000)
programme.desc: A detective (Samuel L. Jackson) and a narcotics cop (Vanessa L. Williams) track a sociopath out to kill a woman who can testify that he committed murder.

programme.title: 3 Days to Kill (2014)
programme.desc: A dying Secret Service agent (Kevin Costner) who wants to reconnect with his estranged daughter (Hailee Steinfeld) is offered a potentially lifesaving drug in exchange for completing one final mission.

programme.title: Welcome to Sarajevo (1997)
programme.desc: A British war reporter (Stephen Dillane) becomes obsessed with an orphanage near the front lines in 1992.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity (2007)
programme.desc: A young couple (Katie Featherston, Micah Sloat) move into their first new home but are disturbed by what appears to be a supernatural presence that is most active at night.

programme.title: Not Without Hope (2025)
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as the Coast Guard launches a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: The Survivalist (2021)
programme.desc: A year and a half after the fall of civilization due to a viral outbreak, a former FBI agent is forced to protect a young woman immune to the disease from a dangerous gang leader hunting her.

programme.title: Reindeer Games (2000)
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Ben Affleck) wants to start a new life with his girlfriend (Charlize Theron), but her brother (Gary Sinise) involves him in a scheme to rob a casino.

programme.title: Deep Impact (1998)
programme.desc: As a comet is on a collision course with earth, humans have to prepare for their survival. They randomly select eight hundred thousand people to be saved in order to keep the human race alive.

programme.title: 2 Days in the Valley (1996)
programme.desc: A hit man (Danny Aiello) falls for an art dealers helper (Glenne Headly) amid confusion in the San Fernando Valley.

programme.title: Old Guy (2024)
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn theyre being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: Shutter Island (2010)
programme.desc: A 1950s lawman (Leonardo DiCaprio) pursues a murderess who appears to have vanished from a locked room within a fortresslike psychiatric hospital.

programme.title: Reindeer Games (2000)
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Ben Affleck) wants to start a new life with his girlfriend (Charlize Theron), but her brother (Gary Sinise) involves him in a scheme to rob a casino.

programme.title: Not Without Hope (2025)
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as the Coast Guard launches a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: Due Justice (2023)
programme.desc: Consumed by grief and driven by revenge, a former Marine embarks on a relentless mission to hunt down those responsible for the brutal murders of his beloved wife and daughter.

programme.title: Supercop (1992)
programme.desc: A Hong Kong policeman (Jackie Chan) and a mainland policewoman (Michelle Yeaoh) meet, team up and join a drug ring to destroy it.

programme.title: The Time Machine (2002)
programme.desc: A scientist (Guy Pearce) travels into the future and meets a race of people who fear hideous monsters living under the ground.

programme.title: Star Trek: Section 31 (2025)
programme.desc: Emperor Philippa Georgiou faces the sins of her past after joining a secret division of Starfleet thats tasked with protecting the United Federation of Planets.

programme.title: The Silent Planet (2024)
programme.desc: Serving a life sentence alone on a distant planet, an aging convict must confront his past when a new prisoner arrives and forces him to remember his life on Earth.

programme.title: Heist 88 (2023)
programme.desc: A criminal mastermind decides to pull one last job before going to prison and recruits a group of young bank employees to steal millions in a daring and brazen assault on the U.S. banking system.

programme.title: Cursed (2005)
programme.desc: Siblings (Christina Ricci, Jesse Eisenberg) hunt for the werewolf that attacked them and transformed them into lycanthropes.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 4 (2012)
programme.desc: A teenager (Kathryn Newton) bears witness to terrifying events that occur when she and her family become the temporary caretakers of a creepy neighbor boy.

programme.title: Cujo (1983)
programme.desc: Bitten by a rabid bat, a huge dog traps a Maine woman (Dee Wallace) and her young son (Danny Pintauro) in their Ford Pinto.

programme.title: Case 39 (2009)
programme.desc: A social worker (Renee Zellweger) saves a girl (Jodelle Ferland) from abusive parents but finds there is more to the child than meets the eye.

programme.title: The Warrior (2001)
programme.desc: A swordsman (Irfan Khan) must outrun a despots henchmen after he renounces violence and heads for the Himalayas.

programme.title: Election (1999)
programme.desc: Tracy faces no competition in her high school election, but the civics teacher intervenes by encouraging the varsity football player to run for president, resulting in chaos.

programme.title: Pretty in Pink (1986)
programme.desc: A rich teen asks an unpopular student to the senior prom, creating problems among their separate circles of friends.

programme.title: I Used to Go Here (2020)
programme.desc: A successful author finds herself deeply enmeshed in the lives of a group of college students after being asked to speak at her alma mater.

programme.title: Shell (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to reclaim her career, once-beloved actress Samantha Lake gets drawn into the glamorous world of wellness mogul Zoe Shannon, only to uncover a monstrous truth beneath the seemingly flawless surface.

programme.title: The To Do List (2013)
programme.desc: Determined to shed her uptight image, a high-school valedictorian (Aubrey Plaza) decides to lose her virginity before college begins. Realizing that she is out of her depth, she asks friends and family for advice.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renee Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Superstar (1999)
programme.desc: An energetic schoolgirl (Molly Shannon) hopes to win a talent contest where a prize as a movie extra might lead to her first kiss.

programme.title: Our Friend (2019)
programme.desc: After Nicole and Matthew receive life-altering news, the couple find unexpected support from their friend Dane, who puts his own life on hold to move into their family home.

programme.title: Case 39 (2009)
programme.desc: A social worker (Renee Zellweger) saves a girl (Jodelle Ferland) from abusive parents but finds there is more to the child than meets the eye.

programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)
programme.desc: Murders draw a young woman (Neve Campbell), a reporter (Courteney Cox Arquette) and an ex-policeman (David Arquette) to the set of a movie inspired by horrific events that they survived.

programme.title: The Stepford Wives (2004)
programme.desc: A man and his wife move to a quaint suburb where most of the women seem to have the same bland personality.

programme.title: The Faculty (1998)
programme.desc: A group of small town High School students, including an introverted photographer and a drug dealer, begin to suspect somethings off with their teachers. They realize that the faculty is under the control of mind-controlling alien parasites.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: The Aviator (2004)
programme.desc: During the 1930s and 40s, wealthy industrialist Howard Hughes (Leonardo DiCaprio) gains fame as a movie producer, airplane designer and pilot.

programme.title: The English Patient (1996)
programme.desc: A Hungarian counts (Ralph Fiennes) fling with a British newlywed leads to tragedy in World War II North Africa.

programme.title: True Grit (2010)
programme.desc: A teenage girl (Hailee Steinfeld) enlists the aid of a boozy, trigger-happy lawman (Jeff Bridges) to hunt down her fathers killer (Josh Brolin).

programme.title: Personal Shopper (2016)
programme.desc: A young American in Paris works as a personal shopper for a celebrity. She seems to have the ability to communicate with spirits, like her recently deceased twin brother. Soon, she starts to receive ambiguous messages from an unknown source.

programme.title: Case 39 (2009)
programme.desc: A social worker (Renee Zellweger) saves a girl (Jodelle Ferland) from abusive parents but finds there is more to the child than meets the eye.

programme.title: The Virgin Suicides (1999)
programme.desc: Men reminisce about intriguing sisters, whose parents (James Woods, Kathleen Turner) quarantined them after one of the five killed herself.

programme.title: Mommie Dearest (1981)
programme.desc: Movie queen Joan Crawford (Faye Dunaway) pampers and punishes her adopted son and daughter (Diana Scarwid).

programme.title: Yes, Madam (1985)
programme.desc: A relentless inspector (Michelle Yeoh) and a Scotland Yard detective (Cynthia Rothrock) investigate murder linked to microfilm.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victims daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandoras box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.sub-title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.desc: An attractive lawyer and Bridgets (Renee Zellweger) former boss (Hugh Grant) threaten her newfound happiness with Mark Darcy (Colin Firth).

programme.title: Florence Foster Jenkins (2016)
programme.desc: In 1940s New York, a man (Hugh Grant) goes to extreme lengths to make sure his wife (Meryl Streep) never finds out that shes an awful opera singer.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment (1983)
programme.desc: A strong-willed woman (Shirley MacLaine) and her equally independent daughter (Debra Winger) keep the lines of communication open as each deals with the curveballs life throws at them.

programme.title: The Evening Star (1996)
programme.desc: A spunky woman (Shirley MacLaine) copes with her troubled adult grandchildren, feuds with an enemy and has a fling with a younger man (Bill Paxton).

programme.title: A Bad Moms Christmas (2017)
programme.desc: As if creating the perfect Christmas for their families isnt hard enough, under-appreciated and overburdened moms Amy, Kiki and Carla will have to do it while hosting and entertaining their own respective mothers during the holidays.

programme.title: Babel (2006)
programme.desc: A tragic accidents scope expands, catching four groups of people on three continents in its terrible grip.

programme.title: Mommie Dearest (1981)
programme.desc: Movie queen Joan Crawford (Faye Dunaway) pampers and punishes her adopted son and daughter (Diana Scarwid).

programme.title: The Peacemaker (1997)
programme.desc: A scientist (Nicole Kidman) and an Army Special Forces colonel (George Clooney) travel the globe in pursuit of stolen nuclear weapons.

programme.title: Hes Just Not That Into You (2009)
programme.sub-title: Hes Just Not That Into You (2009)
programme.desc: Friends and lovers try to navigate their way through the complexities of modern relationships, sometimes misconstruing the true intentions of the opposite sex.

programme.title: Million Dollar Baby (2004)
programme.desc: A deep bond develops between a cantankerous trainer (Clint Eastwood) and the female boxer (Hilary Swank) he reluctantly takes under his wing.

programme.title: Cold Mountain (2003)
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a wounded Confederate soldier (Jude Law) abandons his duties to make his way home to his sweetheart (Nicole Kidman).

programme.title: Chocolat (2000)
programme.desc: The mayor opposes a single mother (Juliette Binoche) who is opening a chocolate shop in his 1950s French village across from a church during Lent.

programme.title: Muriels Wedding (1994)
programme.desc: An Australian social outcast (Toni Collette) moves to Sydney, cares for an ailing friend (Rachel Griffiths) and weds an Olympian needing citizen status.
